description: Petition, bottom left fragment, in Arabic script. Not a lot of content is preserved but the petitioner owes a debt and the ghuramāʾ are pressing him for repayment. Contains the raʾy clause and inhāʾ formula. Probably addressed to a lower state official in a rudimentary hand.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
